ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Amount of renewable energy generated (Wh) */,
  "battery_flow_out" REAL /* Amount of energy flowing out of the battery (Wh) */,
  "battery_flow_in" REAL /* Amount of energy flowing into the battery (Wh) */,
  "curtailment" REAL /* Amount of energy curtailed (Wh) */,
  "energy_demand" REAL /* Energy demand (Wh) */,
  "soc" REAL /* State of Charge of the battery (Wh) */,
  "gen_energy" REAL /* Generated energy (Wh) */,
  "lost_load" REAL /* Lost load (Wh) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (°C) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity (%) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (m/s) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation (W/m²) */,
  "energy_source_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy source (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "battery_health" REAL /* Battery health percentage (%) */,
  "battery_efficiency" REAL /* Battery efficiency percentage (%) */,
  "forecasted_energy_demand" REAL /* Forecasted energy demand (Wh) */,
  "forecasted_energy_generation" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation (Wh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "energy_sources" TEXT /* Types of renewable energy sources available at the site (e.g., solar, wind) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Total battery capacity (Wh) */,
  "battery_model" TEXT /* Model of the battery system */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address for the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions and access levels for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_start_timestamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the data range accessed */,
  "data_end_timestamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the data range accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the site where the data was collected
Amount of energy flowing out of the battery (Wh)
Amount of energy flowing into the battery (Wh)
State of Charge of the battery (Wh)
Type of renewable energy source (e.g., solar, wind)
